summary: Iteration 21: Email Marketing Dashboard Per-File Workflow - ALL TESTS PASSED (13/13 backend, 100% frontend verification)
critical_code_review_comments: MarketingCommandCenter.jsx: Complete 3-step workflow: Upload (Stap 1), Template (Stap 2), Per-File Tracking (Stap 3)
csv_import.py lines 163-166: Filename used as source when no source param provided (source_tag = filename without .csv)
csv_import.py lines 145-152: Column mapping handles street1->street, towncity->city, phone1->phone
csv_import.py lines 498-522: /api/email/csv/queue/stats returns stats grouped by source with pending/sent/failed/unsubscribed counts
CheckoutPage.jsx line 424: PayPal button correctly uses
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and clean up test CSV data (test_unique_source_12345, test_semicolon_cols, test_alt_columns)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Marketing Dashboard at /admin/email-marketing now has 3-step per-file workflow: (1) Upload CSV with drag-drop, filename auto-used as source, (2) Select template, (3) Per-file cards show individual stats and send buttons. Current data: zonnepanelen_leads (22,874 contacts, 1 afgemeld), playwright_test (2 contacts), onbekend (28 contacts, 2 verzonden). PayPal button in checkout uses official CDN logo.

email_marketing_dashboard_3_step_layout.details: Dashboard shows 3 clear steps: Stap 1 (CSV Upload), Stap 2 (Template Select), Stap 3 (Per-File Tracking)

stats_cards.details: 5 stats cards: Totaal (22,904), Wachtend (22,875), Verzonden (2), Mislukt (0), Afgemeld (1)

csv_upload_uses_filename_as_source.details: Backend test confirmed: uploading 'test_unique_source_12345.csv' creates source='test_unique_source_12345'

per_file_cards_with_stats.details: Each source gets own card: onbekend (28, alle verzonden), playwright_test (2 wachtend), zonnepanelen_leads (22,873 wachtend, 1 afgemeld)

per_file_send_button.details: Send button targets specific source: 'Verstuur 22,873 emails' for zonnepanelen_leads

csv_semicolon_delimiter.details: Backend handles semicolon-delimited CSV files correctly

unsubscribe_endpoint.details: Unsubscribe still works, stats show 1 unsubscribed contact

progress_bar_in_file_cards.details: Each file card shows progress bar based on sent/total percentage

template_dropdown.details: Template select dropdown loads templates from API
